description_long: This object is a classic cylindrical metal trash bin, commonly seen in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and alleys. The bin features a vertically ribbed body for structural strength and a domed, removable lid with a central handle for easy lifting. The surface appears to be made of dark, weathered metal, likely galvanized steel, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look. One of the bins is shown with its lid off, revealing a spacious, hollow interior suitable for holding waste. The lids have a slightly raised, radial pattern for added grip and durability. There are no visible wheels or external markings, and the handles are top-mounted and looped for manual handling.
description: A cylindrical, ribbed metal trash bin with a domed, removable lid and a top-mounted handle, finished in dark, weathered metal. The bin is sturdy, unmarked, and lacks wheels.
description_view_0: Three trash bins are shown side by side, two with lids on and one with the lid removed and placed to the side, revealing the open interior.
description_view_1: The bins are aligned front-to-back, with the nearest bin's lid removed and placed flat in front, clearly displaying the domed lid's handle and radial pattern.
description_view_2: The bins are viewed from the opposite side, again showing two with lids on and one with the lid off and placed to the left, highlighting the open top.
description_view_3: The bins are aligned back-to-front, all lids visible, emphasizing the domed shape and radial pattern of the lids.
